title: compile-*-context.ts composers carry hardcoded investigation-specific content in multiple sections — over-fitted to FGAP-026 fixture-cascade audit shape
description: scripts/orchestrator/compile-explore-context.ts AND compile-implementation-context.ts both embed investigation-specific content in hardcoded string literals across multiple XML sections, contradicting the structural-shell intent. Originally filed narrow to compile-explore-context.ts <output_schema_per_site> + <anti_patterns>; user correction surfaced that the pattern applies to (a) the same script in additional sections AND (b) the sibling composer in 4 sections (<verification_gates_orchestrator_runs>, <dec_0018_demo_spec>, <stop_triggers>, <report_back_format>). When the composers are reused for a different investigation (e.g. FGAP-035 cascade-target inventory), the hardcoded sections contradict the per-investigation question. Root pattern: any investigation-specific content baked into a structural composer is the same bug shape, regardless of which section it sits in.

evidence.reference: <output_schema_per_site> + <anti_patterns> sections FGAP-026 fixture-cascade-specific — fixed at c7caac8 via --output-schema + --anti-patterns fragment args

Four sections (<verification_gates_orchestrator_runs>, <dec_0018_demo_spec>, <stop_triggers>, <report_back_format>) carry FGAP-026 C.3 vocabulary (npm test -w @davidorex/pi-workflows, .context-c3-demo, config-required/no-resolver-reach classifications, /tmp/c3-impl-applied.md) — fixed in this commit via --verification-gates + --demo-spec + --stop-triggers + --report-back-format fragment args

impact: Composers over-fit to first use case; reuse for new investigations propagates contradictory instructions into the agent context. Direct evidence this turn: FGAP-035 implementation context compile carried C.3-specific demo spec + stop triggers + report-back format from compile-implementation-context.ts.
canonical_vocabulary: investigation-shape parameterization — per-question output schema + anti-patterns
proposed_resolution: Refactor BOTH composers to pure structural shells; every investigation-specific section becomes a --*-path arg loading a markdown fragment from scripts/orchestrator/templates/<composer>-<section>-<shape>.md. Defaults preserve FGAP-026 fixture-cascade behavior; per-investigation overrides supply <shape> fragments. After: any future hardcoded investigation-specific content in any composer is the same FGAP-039 root pattern; default-fragment-as-hardcode-bridge is the same hardcode-dressed-as-default failure DEC-0015 names.
